Uses of Class
io.mangoo.routing.routes.ControllerRoute

  • Packages that use ControllerRoute 
    Package Description
    io.mangoo.routing  
    io.mangoo.routing.routes  

    • Uses of ControllerRoute in io.mangoo.routing

      Methods in io.mangoo.routing that return ControllerRoute 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static ControllerRoute Bind.controller​(Class<?> clazz)
      Creates a new controller route for binding multiple routes

    • Uses of ControllerRoute in io.mangoo.routing.routes

      Methods in io.mangoo.routing.routes that return ControllerRoute 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ControllerRoute ControllerRoute.withAuthentication()
      Sets authentication to true for all provided routes, default is false
      ControllerRoute ControllerRoute.withAuthorization()
      Sets authentication to true for all provided routes, default is false Also sets authentication to true, default is false
      ControllerRoute ControllerRoute.withBasicAuthentication​(String username, String password)
      Sets Basic HTTP authentication to all method on the given controller class
      ControllerRoute ControllerRoute.withNonBlocking()
      Configures this request as long running request that is executed in a different thread pool to not block the non blocking I/O request
      ControllerRoute ControllerRoute.withRequestLimit​(int requestsPerSecond)
      Sets a request limit to the request
